emails.subject: Attendees at Newport Beach Workshop
emails.body: Only 53 signed up so far but here it is frequently more arrive at last minute. Steve Marcus Nettelton is doing EOL while Leslie is on maternity leave. Have a great weekend Forwarded by Elizabeth Sager/HOU/ECT on 04/13/2001 03:14 PM "Andy Katz" <AKatz@eei.org> 04/13/2001 02:39 PM
